feature: Automated Seller Reminder Worker (push 15min + email digest 24h)

cases.desc: Push fires for intent older than 15min when seller hasn't replied
Push suppressed when seller has replied in conv after intent.created_at
Idempotency — push_15min row present blocks re-push
Email digest fires for intent older than 24h, email_24h row inserted
Strong idempotency — ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING keeps row count = 1, no double push

sql_fix.previous_bug: column 'user_a' does not exist on conversations table
sql_fix.root_cause: Old query joined conversations.user_a — a non-existent column
sql_fix.fix: Replaced with NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages WHERE conv_id=i.conv_id AND sender_id=i.seller_id AND created_at > i.created_at)
